title: Invoices
selectInvoiceDesc: Choose an invoice from the list to view tenant details, payment breakdown, and manage the status.
manualGenerationDesc: Invoice creation via UI directly is under construction based on requirements.
calculationFailed: Failed to calculate. Ensure room has active contract & tenant.

automation.title: Auto Invoice Generation
automation.description: Set up monthly automatic invoice generation for your account
automation.dayOfMonthDesc: The system will automatically scan and generate invoices on this day each month.
automation.graceDaysDesc: Number of days the tenant has to pay after the invoice is generated (due date).
